mentions.note: Part of 'Big Five Travel' theme; terrific trades ahead of earnings.
Airlines strong, but TSA debacle raises travel friction concerns; hold current positions pending clarity on trip-cancellation impact from geopolitical events.
Excellent CEO Ed Bastian, reliable earner in volatile group. War escalation and possible month-long conflict would hurt airline demand and numbers. Reports Wednesday before open.
Airline used for endless day-trading games based on oil/Iran rumors; Cramer criticizes lack of skill edge in these trades; discipline required if holding.
CEO Bastian reports strong travel and business travel demand despite $95 oil; real-world data beats Wall Street skepticism on airline margins.
